headline: Jim Cramer on GE Aerospace Upcoming Earnings: “It Might Be a Tad Disappointing”
summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s recent Mad Money game plan. Noting the impact of the war on the company, Cramer said: GE Aerospace reports. It might be a tad disappointing because it makes a lot of revenue from airplane maintenance, and there’s been some serious downtime during the war, […]

headline: The Pentagon wants GM, Ford to build weapons and bombs — here’s what happened last time during World War II
summary: Automakers could help build weapons as U.S. supplies run low, but a World War II-style industrial shift may be more challenging to pull off today.

headline: GE Aerospace (GE) and Indian Airforce Partner to Advance Aerospace Ecosystem
summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) is one of the best defense stocks that will skyrocket. On April 13, GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) inked an agreement with the Indian Air Force, paving the way for the establishment of an in-country depot facility. The facility, tailored for the F404-IN20 engines that power the IAF’s Light Combat Aircraft Tejas fleet, will […]
